name: Crockpot Chicken & Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute onion and garlic until lightly browned.
2. Remove onion and garlic from the skillet.
3. Add sausage and chicken to the skillet and brown them.
4. Drain excess fat and pat the chicken dry with paper towels.
5. Transfer all other ingredients (onions, peppers, zucchini, mushrooms, tomatoes, tomato paste) along with the sauteed mixture to the crockpot.
6. Place sausage on top of the chicken breasts in the crockpot.
7. Cover and cook on low setting for 6-8 hours until the chicken is cooked through.
